description: This file defines a function to generate a table of contents (TOC) tree structure from a list of Markdown headings, including filtering based on heading depth and managing nested children.

classes.name: TocEntry
classes.description: An interface extending MarkdownHeading with a children array to represent nested TOC entries.

methods.name: generateToc
methods.description: Generates a hierarchical TOC structure from a list of Markdown headings, filtering by depth range specified in configuration.

methods.name: getEntryChildrenAtDepth
methods.description: Recursively retrieves the children entries at a specified depth level within a TOC entry.
